chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1302 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE 1.For order son CMA 5184/24 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 5185/24 4.For hearing of CMA 5186/24 5.For hearing of main case 16-09-2024 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. ***** 1. Urgency granted. 2. Office objection(s) to be deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. Counsel for petitioner states that petitioner as evident from page-33 passed various subjects with flying colors except he is declared ‘Fail’ in Sindhi/Urdu subject by one mark giving him 32 marks, whereas, in English Précis and Composition he has obtained 62 marks, in General Science and Ability 60 marks, in Islamic/ Comparative study 66 marks. Counsel states that as the petitioner fearing foul play, requested for re-totaling and re-counting of his Sindhi/Urdu paper; however, his request was dismissed by letter available at page-39 stating that “no error” was found. Counsel states that this is the last attempt for the petitioner and while respondents be directed to provide the answer sheet of Sindhi/Urdu paper in a sealed envelope to this Court, in the meanwhile, petitioner also be permitted to sit in the viva voce to be conducted in respect of candidates of Sukkur at Hyderabad. 2 Issue notices to respondents as well as AAG for 01.10.2024 at 11:00 a.m. In the meanwhile, without prejudice to further orders of this Court, respondents shall provide a sealed copy of answer sheet of Sindhi/Urdu paper of petitioner to this Court as well petitioner also be entitled to appear in the viva voce as per schedule provided to this Court at page-13 through statement and no prejudice be caused to him on the basis of his Sindhi/Urdu marks being 32 till the next date of hearing.

Counsel states that this is the last attempt for the petitioner and while respondents be directed to provide the answer sheet of Sindhi/Urdu paper in a sealed envelope to this Court, in the meanwhile, petitioner also be permitted to sit in the viva voce to be conducted in respect of candidates of Sukkur at Hyderabad. 2 Issue notices to respondents as well as AAG for 01.10.2024 at 11:00 a.m. In the meanwhile, without prejudice to further orders of this Court, respondents shall provide a sealed copy of answer sheet of Sindhi/Urdu paper of petitioner to this Court as well petitioner also be entitled to appear in the viva voce as per schedule provided to this Court at page-13 through statement and no prejudice be caused to him on the basis of his Sindhi/Urdu marks being 32 till the next date of hearing. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
